---
title: 'Producing Results'
date: '2010-01-16T02:12:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8740968583767628145'
blogger_filename: '/2010/01/producing-results.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

God is meeting my needs...<br />
I haven't had anyone else offer me food <b>yet</b>, although I one person ask me today if I ever ate, because the left for lunch and came back and I was still there. However I am finding I don't need food at lunch like I thought I did. I am more productive now. I'm getting a new resume' built, working on projects, it's great. Next week I'll spend more time praying too. Once I decided that I wasn't going to eat unless God brought it I haven't needed to. It's been amazing! I always thought I NEEDED to eat for blood sugar. I found that was a line fed by the devil to keep me in bondage! I'm FREE!<br />
<br />
Darrell G. Wolfe
